items.title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 people
items.summary: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.

items.title: 2026 Sees the Most Right Whale Calves Born in One Season Since 2009
items.summary: This year’s calving season along the southeast coastline of America has documented the most North Atlantic right whale calves since 2009. Additionally, trends in calf births seem to indicate a normali…
